title: 原來毅進制係log linear scale

replies.msg:
請睇圖
Data來源:歷年71遊行同近幾次反送中
說重點謝謝

就咁將警方報告人數vs民陣報告人數plot埋一齊係睇唔出乜野
但係將兩者都take log再做fitting,就會見到線性關係,變得有跡可循
我maths拎2 對唔住

或者再講多d
個m係個警方對民陣比例,如果m<1姐係警方報告人數少過民陣
c係個穩定既增加/扣減數字,c<0姐係警方每次都固定扣減左一堆人

replies.msg: 冇錯,我讀書讀壞腦唔識解毒撚語

Log scale

如圖所見log同linear既分別除左直線同曲線
就係log有極限值 升到咁上下就會停
用黎推算人流代表無論你塞d咩數值入去
計出黎既數值都唔會超過某一個上限
依個就係毅進制數字一直咁低既原因
可想而知用log去計有幾唔合理 同弱智

毅進仔用到既Log-linear scale
係一種代入法 將曲線方程 以直線方程 既形式表示
數學家原意係用黎方便 表示/觀察/預計
亦係廣告常見既統計學錯覺之一
警犬用意當然就係去蒙騙市民

利申數統拎E有錯請指正

replies.msg:
log係唔會converge既,應該話上升速度會越來越慢,而唔係唔會有上限
不過原因差唔多,就算示威人數大大增加,警方log轉換報告人數都唔會增加幾多

quote.msg:
Log scale

如圖所見log同linear既分別除左直線同曲線
就係log有極限值 升到咁上下就會停
用黎推算人流代表無論你塞d咩數值入去
計出黎既數值都唔會超過某一個上限
依個就係毅進制數字一直咁低既原因
可想而知用log去計有幾唔合理 同弱智

毅進仔用到既Log-linear scale
係一種代入法 將曲線方程 以直線方程 既形式表示
數學家原意係用黎方便 表示/觀察/預計
亦係廣告常見既統計學錯覺之一
警犬用意當然就係去蒙騙市民

利申數統拎E有錯請指正

log係唔會converge既,應該話上升速度會越來越慢,而唔係唔會有上限
不過原因差唔多,就算示威人數大大增加,警方log轉換報告人數都唔會增加幾多

replies.msg:
linear function 都唔會 converge
log 去到某個位就會細過 linear function / 細過 x 既任意正數次方

BTW, m = 0.935 細過 1 少少
而 c = -0.7276 大約 0.187, 姐係打 1.9折

BTW2, 個 interval for c 其實幾大

quote.msg:
小弟數學白痴
係咪即係話
其實佢地根本冇數過
只係民陣彈乜數字出來
佢地就用條式彈個細好多既數?

應該唔係methodology既問題,如果單純係systematic error冇理由會係exponential既差別

Log scale

如圖所見log同linear既分別除左直線同曲線
就係log有極限值 升到咁上下就會停
用黎推算人流代表無論你塞d咩數值入去
計出黎既數值都唔會超過某一個上限
依個就係毅進制數字一直咁低既原因

replies.msg:
I think actually the same model can apply to both, if I have not made a mistake.

The reason why you think it is difference because your 2013 year of June 4 a bit is an outlier. In fact, I think it is a mistakes as I am not sure doggie has reported 54k, whilst we reported only 15k. I suspect it is 150k. I double check the figure (as I cannot find the sources of both 1 July and 4 June numbers) in the diagram https://www.scmp.com/news/hong-kong/politics/article/3007194/proportion-regulars-annual-june-4-candlelight-vigil-hong and indeed I think the number is wrong.

Once adjust this, the two regression line are closer. And the stat. difference between June 4 and July 1 goes away (i.e. the category variable for this gone away). (BTW, the first walk of July 1 is another outliner if look at the joint plot. But remove or keep it does not affect the result.)

In other words, the same log-linear can predict doggie output from our output (and vice visa). In fact, I can think as doggie said the it is different for the walk as counting method is different. And may be not too surprise they report correlate figures.

But for sitting in Victoria Park, whilst doggie number is less is a mystery. May be short-sighted.

I double check the figure (as I cannot find the sources of both 1 July and 4 June numbers) in the diagram https://www.scmp.com/news/hong-kong/politics/article/3007194/proportion-regulars-annual-june-4-candlelight-vigil-hong and indeed I think the number is wrong.

Once adjust this, the two regression line are closer. And the stat. difference between June 4 and July 1 goes away (i.e. the category variable for this gone away). (BTW, the first walk of July 1 is another outliner if look at the joint plot. But remove or keep it does not affect the result.)

In other words, the same log-linear can predict doggie output from our output (and vice visa). In fact, I can think as doggie said the it is different for the walk as counting method is different. And may be not too surprise they report correlate figures.

I think actually the same model can apply to both, if I have not made a mistake.

The reason why you think it is difference because your 2013 year of June 4 a bit is an outlier. In fact, I think it is a mistakes as I am not sure doggie has reported 54k, whilst we reported only 15k. I suspect it is 150k. I double check the figure (as I cannot find the sources of both 1 July and 4 June numbers) in the diagram https://www.scmp.com/news/hong-kong/politics/article/3007194/proportion-regulars-annual-june-4-candlelight-vigil-hong and indeed I think the number is wrong.

Once adjust this, the two regression line are closer. And the stat. difference between June 4 and July 1 goes away (i.e. the category variable for this gone away). (BTW, the first walk of July 1 is another outliner if look at the joint plot. But remove or keep it does not affect the result.)

In other words, the same log-linear can predict doggie output from our output (and vice visa). In fact, I can think as doggie said the it is different for the walk as counting method is different. And may be not too surprise they report correlate figures.

But for sitting in Victoria Park, whilst doggie number is less is a mystery. May be short-sighted.
